prompt: get me an APA citation for BERT pre-training of deep bidirectional transformers

assertions.name: correct-paper
assertions.description: Citation is for Devlin et al. BERT paper

assertions.name: apa-format
assertions.description: Output is APA-style plain text, not BibTeX

assertions.name: from-publisher
assertions.description: Citation was fetched via API, not hallucinated

assertions.name: used-citation-js
assertions.description: citation-js was used (or attempted) as the formatter

assertions.name: original-publisher-doi
assertions.description: Used the ACL publisher DOI, not arXiv
